# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _
import groovy.transform.Field

@Field
def ALLOWED_COMMANDS = [
    'mvn', 'gradle', 'npm', 'yarn', 'docker', 'kubectl', 'helm',
    'python', 'pip', 'pytest', 'go', 'cargo', 'make', 'ant',
    'dotnet', 'composer', 'bundle', 'rake', 'sbt', 'lein'
]

@Field
def BLOCKED_PATTERNS = [
    /rm\s+-rf/,
    /;\s*rm/,
    /&&\s*rm/,
    /\|\s*rm/,
    /curl.*\|.*sh/,
    /wget.*\|.*sh/,
    /eval/,
    /exec/,
    /system\(/,
    /`.*`/,
    /\$\(.*\)/,
    />\s*\/dev/,
    /dd\s+if=/,
    /mkfs/,
    /fdisk/,
    /:\(\)\{.*:\|:&\};:/,
    /\/etc\/passwd/,
    /\/etc\/shadow/,
    /sudo/,
    /su\s+-/,
    /chmod\s+777/,
    /chown\s+root/,
    /nc\s+-l/,
    /netcat/,
    /\/bin\/bash\s+-i/,
    /\/bin\/sh\s+-i/,
    /base64.*decode/,
    /\.\.\/\.\.\//
]

@Field
def MAX_COMMAND_LENGTH = 500

@Field
def ALLOWED_PATHS = [
    '/workspace',
    '/tmp/build',
    '/opt/app',
    './build',
    './dist',
    './target',
    './out'
]

properties([
    parameters([
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_TYPE',
            choices: ['maven', 'gradle', 'npm', 'docker', 'python', 'go', 'custom'],
            description: 'Select build type'
        ),
        text(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Build command (e.g., mvn clean install)'
        ),
        text(
            name: 'TEST_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Test command (e.g., npm test)'
        ),
        text(
            name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Deployment command (e.g., kubectl apply -f deployment.yaml)'
        ),
        string(
            name: 'WORKING_DIRECTORY',
            defaultValue: './workspace',
            description: 'Working directory for commands'
        ),
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip test execution'
        ),
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_DEPLOY',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip deployment'
        ),
        string(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT',
            defaultValue: 'dev',
            description: 'Target environment (dev/staging/prod)'
        ),
        text(
            name: 'ADDITIONAL_ARGS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Additional arguments for build command'
        )
    ])
])

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    options {
        timeout(time: 2, unit: 'HOURS')
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }
    
    environment {
        WORKSPACE_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}"
        BUILD_ID = "${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
        SANITIZED_BUILD_CMD = ''
        SANITIZED_TEST_CMD = ''
        SANITIZED_DEPLOY_CMD = ''
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Parameter Validation ==="
                    
                    validateEnvironment(params.ENVIRONMENT)
                    validateWorkingDirectory(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                    
                    if (params.BUILD_COMMAND) {
                        env.SANITIZED_BUILD_CMD = sanitizeCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND, 'BUILD')
                    }
                    
                    if (params.TEST_COMMAND && !params.SKIP_TESTS) {
                        env.SANITIZED_TEST_CMD = sanitizeCommand(params.TEST_COMMAND, 'TEST')
                    }
                    
                    if (params.DEPLOY_COMMAND && !params.SKIP_DEPLOY) {
                        env.SANITIZED_DEPLOY_CMD = sanitizeCommand(params.DEPLOY_COMMAND, 'DEPLOY')
                    }
                    
                    if (params.ADDITIONAL_ARGS) {
                        validateAdditionalArgs(params.ADDITIONAL_ARGS)
                    }
                    
                    echo "All parameters validated successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Setup Environment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Environment Setup ==="
                    
                    def workDir = sanitizePath(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                    
                    sh """
                        mkdir -p ${workDir}
                        cd ${workDir}
                        pwd
                        ls -la
                    """
                    
                    echo "Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "Build Type: ${params.BUILD_TYPE}"
                    echo "Working Directory: ${workDir}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression { env.SANITIZED_BUILD_CMD != '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Build Stage ==="
                    
                    def workDir = sanitizePath(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                    def buildCmd = env.SANITIZED_BUILD_CMD
                    
                    if (params.ADDITIONAL_ARGS) {
                        def sanitizedArgs = sanitizeCommand(params.ADDITIONAL_ARGS, 'ARGS')
                        buildCmd = "${buildCmd} ${sanitizedArgs}"
                    }
                    
                    echo "Executing build command: ${buildCmd}"
                    
                    dir(workDir) {
                        executeSecureCommand(buildCmd, 'BUILD')
                    }
                    
                    echo "Build completed successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { env.SANITIZED_TEST_CMD != '' }
                    expression { params.SKIP_TESTS == false }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Test Stage ==="
                    
                    def workDir = sanitizePath(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                    def testCmd = env.SANITIZED_TEST_CMD
                    
                    echo "Executing test command: ${testCmd}"
                    
                    dir(workDir) {
                        executeSecureCommand(testCmd, 'TEST')
                    }
                    
                    echo "Tests completed successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { env.SANITIZED_DEPLOY_CMD != '' }
                    expression { params.SKIP_DEPLOY == false }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Deploy Stage ==="
                    
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT == 'prod') {
                        input message: 'Deploy to Production?', ok: 'Deploy'
                    }
                    
                    def workDir = sanitizePath(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                    def deployCmd = env.SANITIZED_DEPLOY_CMD
                    
                    echo "Executing deployment command: ${deployCmd}"
                    echo "Target environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}"
                    
                    dir(workDir) {
                        executeSecureCommand(deployCmd, 'DEPLOY')
                    }
                    
                    echo "Deployment completed successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Build Actions') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Post-Build Actions ==="
                    
                    def workDir = sanitizePath(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY)
                    
                    dir(workDir) {
                        sh """
                            echo "Build artifacts:"
                            find . -type f -name "*.jar" -o -name "*.war" -o -name "*.zip" -o -name "*.tar.gz" 2>/dev/null || true
                            
                            echo "Disk usage:"
                            du -sh . 2>/dev/null || true
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            script {
                echo "Pipeline completed successfully!"
                echo "Build Type: ${params.BUILD_TYPE}"
                echo "Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}"
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "Pipeline failed!"
                echo "Check logs for details"
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                cleanWs(
                    deleteDirs: true,
                    disableDeferredWipeout: true,
                    patterns: [
                        [pattern: 'target/**', type: 'INCLUDE'],
                        [pattern: 'build/**', type: 'INCLUDE'],
                        [pattern: 'dist/**', type: 'INCLUDE'],
                        [pattern: 'node_modules/**', type: 'INCLUDE']
                    ]
                )
            }
        }
    }
}

def sanitizeCommand(String command, String stage) {
    if (!command || command.trim().isEmpty()) {
        error("${stage}: Command cannot be empty")
    }
    
    def trimmedCommand = command.trim()
    
    if (trimmedCommand.length() > MAX_COMMAND_LENGTH) {
        error("${stage}: Command exceeds maximum length of ${MAX_COMMAND_LENGTH} characters")
    }
    
    for (pattern in BLOCKED_PATTERNS) {
        if (trimmedCommand =~ pattern) {
            error("${stage}: Command contains blocked pattern: ${pattern}")
        }
    }
    
    def commandParts = trimmedCommand.split(/\s+/)
    def baseCommand = commandParts[0]
    
    if (!ALLOWED_COMMANDS.contains(baseCommand)) {
        error("${stage}: Command '${baseCommand}' is not in the allowed list")
    }
    
    if (trimmedCommand.contains('..')) {
        error("${stage}: Path traversal detected in command")
    }
    
    if (trimmedCommand.contains('$') && !(trimmedCommand =~ /\$\{[A-Z_]+\}/)) {
        error("${stage}: Suspicious variable expansion detected")
    }
    
    def dangerousChars = ['|', ';', '&', '>', '<', '`', '\n', '\r']
    for (char in dangerousChars) {
        if (trimmedCommand.contains(char) && !isAllowedUsage(trimmedCommand, char)) {
            error("${stage}: Dangerous character '${char}' detected in command")
        }
    }
    
    echo "${stage}: Command validated: ${trimmedCommand}"
    return trimmedCommand
}

def isAllowedUsage(String command, String character) {
    if (character == '|' && command =~ /grep|awk|sed/) {
        return true
    }
    if (character == '>' && command =~ />\s+[a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.\/]+\.(log|txt|out)$/) {
        return true
    }
    return false
}

def validateEnvironment(String env) {
    def allowedEnvs = ['dev', 'test', 'staging', 'prod', 'qa']
    if (!allowedEnvs.contains(env.toLowerCase())) {
        error("Invalid environment: ${env}. Allowed: ${allowedEnvs.join(', ')}")
    }
}

def validateWorkingDirectory(String dir) {
    def sanitizedDir = sanitizePath(dir)
    
    if (sanitizedDir.contains('..')) {
        error("Path traversal detected in working directory")
    }
    
    def isAllowed = ALLOWED_PATHS.any { allowedPath ->
        sanitizedDir.startsWith(allowedPath) || sanitizedDir == allowedPath
    }
    
    if (!isAllowed) {
        error("Working directory '${sanitizedDir}' is not in allowed paths")
    }
}

def validateAdditionalArgs(String args) {
    if (args.length() > 200) {
        error("Additional arguments exceed maximum length")
    }
    
    for (pattern in BLOCKED_PATTERNS) {
        if (args =~ pattern) {
            error("Additional arguments contain blocked pattern")
        }
    }
}

def sanitizePath(String path) {
    def sanitized = path.replaceAll(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.\/]/, '')
    
    while (sanitized.contains('//')) {
        sanitized = sanitized.replace('//', '/')
    }
    
    if (sanitized.startsWith('./')) {
        sanitized = "${WORKSPACE}/${sanitized.substring(2)}"
    } else if (!sanitized.startsWith('/')) {
        sanitized = "${WORKSPACE}/${sanitized}"
    }
    
    return sanitized
}

def executeSecureCommand(String command, String stage) {
    try {
        timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES') {
            def exitCode = sh(
                script: command,
                returnStatus: true
            )
            
            if (exitCode != 0) {
                error("${stage}: Command failed with exit code ${exitCode}")
            }
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        error("${stage}: Command execution failed: ${e.message}")
    }
}
